request.prompt: a members table where each row has a remove button

children.text: Are you sure you want to remove Alice Smith? They will lose access immediately.
Are you sure you want to remove Bob Jones? They will lose access immediately.

findings.message: Required sub-component 'alert-dialog-cancel' (min 1) not found among descendants (found 0).
findings.rationale: A confirmation without an explicit cancel action and a title naming the consequence funnels the user toward the destructive action; the title is also required for aria-labelledby.

findings.message: Required sub-component 'alert-dialog-title' (min 1) not found among descendants (found 0).
findings.rationale: A confirmation without an explicit cancel action and a title naming the consequence funnels the user toward the destructive action; the title is also required for aria-labelledby.

findings.message: Required sub-component 'alert-dialog-cancel' (min 1) not found among descendants (found 0).
findings.rationale: A confirmation without an explicit cancel action and a title naming the consequence funnels the user toward the destructive action; the title is also required for aria-labelledby.

findings.message: Required sub-component 'alert-dialog-title' (min 1) not found among descendants (found 0).
findings.rationale: A confirmation without an explicit cancel action and a title naming the consequence funnels the user toward the destructive action; the title is also required for aria-labelledby.

findings.message: 'alert-dialog-trigger' must carry non-empty text somewhere in its subtree (none found).
findings.rationale: The trigger must present an accessible label: non-empty text somewhere under the trigger. Protocol projections lift the label from the trigger's subtree (preferring a label-bearing button; lifts are audited) — a trigger with no label text anywhere yields a control with no accessible name and an instance downstream emitters must refuse.

findings.message: 'alert-dialog-trigger' must carry non-empty text somewhere in its subtree (none found).
findings.rationale: The trigger must present an accessible label: non-empty text somewhere under the trigger. Protocol projections lift the label from the trigger's subtree (preferring a label-bearing button; lifts are audited) — a trigger with no label text anywhere yields a control with no accessible name and an instance downstream emitters must refuse.

Your surface violates 6 governance rule finding(s) of the "shadcn/ui" design system:

Violation 1: [rule.alertdialog-requires-cancel / must]
  At: $.root.children[0].children[1].children[0].children[3].children[0] (component: alert-dialog)
  Required sub-component 'alert-dialog-cancel' (min 1) not found among descendants (found 0).
  Why: A confirmation without an explicit cancel action and a title naming the consequence funnels the user toward the destructive action; the title is also required for aria-labelledby.

  Required sub-component 'alert-dialog-title' (min 1) not found among descendants (found 0).
  Why: A confirmation without an explicit cancel action and a title naming the consequence funnels the user toward the destructive action; the title is also required for aria-labelledby.
Violation 3: [rule.alertdialog-requires-cancel / must]
  At: $.root.children[0].children[2].children[3].children[0] (component: alert-dialog)
  Required sub-component 'alert-dialog-cancel' (min 1) not found among descendants (found 0).
  Why: A confirmation without an explicit cancel action and a title naming the consequence funnels the user toward the destructive action; the title is also required for aria-labelledby.
Violation 4: [rule.alertdialog-requires-cancel / must]
  At: $.root.children[0].children[2].children[3].children[0] (component: alert-dialog)
  Required sub-component 'alert-dialog-title' (min 1) not found among descendants (found 0).
  Why: A confirmation without an explicit cancel action and a title naming the consequence funnels the user toward the destructive action; the title is also required for aria-labelledby.
Violation 5: [rule.trigger-carries-label / must]
  At: $.root.children[0].children[1].children[0].children[4] (component: alert-dialog-trigger)
  'alert-dialog-trigger' must carry non-empty text somewhere in its subtree (none found).
  Why: The trigger must present an accessible label: non-empty text somewhere under the trigger. Protocol projections lift the label from the trigger's subtree (preferring a label-bearing button; lifts are audited) — a trigger with no label text anywhere yields a control with no accessible name and an instance downstream emitters must refuse.
Violation 6: [rule.trigger-carries-label / must]

Protocol projections lift the label from the trigger's subtree (preferring a label-bearing button; lifts are audited) — a trigger with no label text anywhere yields a control with no accessible name and an instance downstream emitters must refuse.

This action cannot be undone."},{"component":"alert-dialog-footer","children":[{"component":"alert-dialog-cancel","text":"Cancel"},{"component":"alert-dialog-action","text":"Delete account"}]}]}]}]}}
